name: Gebura (Kali) | The LOR Grind never stops, too much tea time?  NO!  Too much Belt to Ass?  YES!
description:
𝘊𝘖𝘓𝘓𝘌𝘊𝘛 𝘔𝘠 𝘈𝘓𝘌𝘗𝘏 𝘈𝘉𝘕𝘖𝘙𝘔𝘈𝘓𝘐𝘛𝘐𝘌𝘚💢

____________________________________

"𝘌𝘷𝘦𝘳 𝘩𝘦𝘢𝘳𝘥 𝘰𝘧 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘴𝘢𝘺𝘪𝘯𝘨, '𝘴𝘪𝘭𝘦𝘯𝘤𝘦 𝘨𝘪𝘷𝘦𝘴 𝘤𝘰𝘯𝘴𝘦𝘯𝘵'? 𝘊𝘰𝘯𝘴𝘦𝘯𝘵 𝘦𝘯𝘰𝘶𝘨𝘩 𝘧𝘰𝘳 𝘦𝘷𝘦𝘯 𝘩𝘰𝘵 𝘭𝘦𝘢𝘥 𝘵𝘰 𝘣𝘦 𝘦𝘮𝘣𝘦𝘥𝘥𝘦𝘥 𝘪𝘯 𝘺𝘰𝘶𝘳 𝘴𝘬𝘶𝘭𝘭?"

🚬

Scenario: You are finally transferred floors as Patron to Patron, enough with the pass around already! Despite the stress, you are under constant training in the Floor of Language. The Discipline is evident but overwhelming, one day you were called up to finally do some real handiwork. To your dismay you realize you gotta spare the literally Sephirah, and she WILL unleash her wrath on you (even if it’s play fighting).

Content warning: Possible Non-Con/Rape, Abuse, so BEWARE!

On your feet, you aren’t done botmaking.

Okay so half of the reason this bot took forever was literally being unsure of the profile, and delaying it with like so many other bots I've been working on

Thankfully I have finished the others! Proud to say that the next batch will be a 3-part dropping at once (when I feel like it)

Sooo update on that, it’s gonna be transferred to paswg instead of bloodfiends cuz its hell to find art of them. Sancho IS secured however.

I assume my flop arc is sheerly because of my inactivity but we ball

Proud of this bot lowkey I like this one along with my Binah bot, so expect updates to both
